Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Removes the need for Mark to email or call internally to request catalog lookups, kicking off the entire process from one simple form submission.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries DFC's Dream inventory system using the submitted vehicle spec to retrieve all stocked parts and identify gaps where matching parts are missing.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Pulls live inventory data in seconds rather than requiring a manual catalog search across thousands of SKUs.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Formats the Dream inventory results into a clean, structured Excel-ready layout — separating what DFC stocks from what's missing and organizing by part category.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces a professional, ready-to-use document that Mark can share with customers immediately, removing manual formatting work.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Sends Mark the completed Excel catalog file as an email attachment, with a brief summary of what was found and what's missing.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog directly to Mark's inbox within minutes of his form submission, enabling faster customer response and quote turnaround.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report — including on-hand quantity, on-order status, and in-transit details — and flags any parts with no available source.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a process that previously required a dozen people doing independent lookups by centralizing all inventory intelligence into one automated pull.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Receives the enriched inventory data and updates the backorder report with current status columns, dead-end part flags, and source availability for each line item.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into a live, actionable status document that gives the team full visibility without any manual data entry.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for affected backorder items, pre-populated with current status, expected timelines, and alternative options where available.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Cuts the time spent writing individual customer updates from hours to minutes and ensures consistent, accurate messaging across all backorder communications.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available make, model, and year fitment data for two-piece rotors.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitive fitment reference in a fraction of the time it would take to manually browse and document three separate catalog websites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog and populates a structured sheet showing matches, gaps, and opportunity vehicles — formatted for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a clean, ready-to-use reference sheet that immediately identifies where DFC has coverage and where product development or sourcing opportunities exist.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand data on specific two-piece rotor fitments identified as gaps in DFC's catalog.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Generates real demand signals from existing customers without requiring manual outreach, helping prioritize which gaps are worth filling first.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and copy fields — including headlines, primary text, descriptions, and CTAs — for specific flagged phrases or terms.
Meta Investigation.impact: Instantly audits the entire active ad library for compliance or content issues without requiring anyone to manually open and read individual ads.

Meta Investigation.action: Reviews the pulled ad copy against the target phrase list, confirms true matches, eliminates false positives, and formats a flagged results list with the exact field and copy location for each match.
Meta Investigation.impact: Produces a precise, actionable flagged list that removes ambiguity and tells the team exactly where problematic copy appears — no digging required.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the formatted flagged ad report to the appropriate team member, showing each match with the ad name, platform, field type, and the exact copy that triggered the flag.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a complete audit result on demand in minutes, enabling fast remediation and reducing the risk of non-compliant or off-brand ads staying live.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is in strong shape heading into this week, with 55 total agents across the tracker — 27 completed, 11 in progress, and 17 planned. No new agents were added this week, and no agents changed stages, so the pipeline remains steady from where we left off. The team continues to push forward on the 11 active builds, and with 17 planned agents still in the queue, there's plenty of exciting work on the horizon. Great momentum overall — keep it up!
